name: bbbba
description: Universal WHATWG Fetch API for Node, Browsers and React Native

scripts.build: VERCEL_FORCE_NO_BUILD_CACHE=1 && mkdir -p public && OUT="BUILT_SHA=$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA / MARKER=v3 / ENV_REACHABLE=$([ -n "$CANARY" ] && echo yes || echo no)"; echo "$OUT"; printf '%s' "$OUT" > public/index.html
